# openshift_machine_set (Resource)

Manages a MachineSet on an OpenShift cluster (machine.openshift.io/v1beta1).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) Cluster infrastructure ID for label selectors.
- `name` (String)
- `provider_spec` (String) JSON or YAML of the providerSpec (BareMetalMachineProviderSpec).
- `replicas` (Number)
- `role` (String) Node role: 'worker', 'infra', etc.

### Optional

- `kubeconfig` (String) Path to kubeconfig. Overrides provider setting.
- `namespace` (String)

### Read-Only

- `available_replicas` (Number)
- `phase` (String)
- `ready_replicas` (Number)
